ksa_text: Knowledge of AI system inventory and documentation management, including cataloging and tracking of deployed AI systems, maintenance of organizational AI system registries, deployment status documentation, technical asset management, and organizational awareness of the AI technology landscape.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain AI Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.0) to justify inclusion for the Data and AI Research Scientist. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Data and AI Research Scientist roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm AI Governance is not a standard competency expectation for Data and AI Research Scientist. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Data and AI Research Scientist competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (AI Governance) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Data and AI Research Scientist. All passes support exclusion.
